Arrival.B11: Gravel drive on the right — there's room for 2 cars. Do not block the mailbox.
Arrival.B12: If GPS sends you up the fire road, ignore it. Stay on Ridge Way past the red barn.
Arrival.B14: Coffee shops in the Local Guide tab are the best bet; the lockbox won't open before 3 PM.

WiFi + Tech.B11: Netflix: already signed in. Hulu: guest@smokiesridge.com / stay2024
WiFi + Tech.B13: Nest on the hallway wall. Please keep between 65-78°F. Auto-schedule resumes after you leave.
WiFi + Tech.B14: The black Roku remote is the one to use. HDMI1 is Fire TV.
WiFi + Tech.B15: Host first (see Emergency tab). If no answer — Spectrum: 1-833-267-6094

House Rules.B14:
• Hot tub closes at 10 PM
• Please don't move furniture
• If you break something, tell us — we'd rather fix it than discover it later

Local Guide.name: Mountain Grind
Local Guide.notes: Best espresso in town; small pastry case fills fast

Local Guide.name: The Cast Iron
Local Guide.notes: Sunday brunch is chef's-kiss — reserve ahead

Local Guide.name: Ridge BBQ
Local Guide.notes: Brisket sells out by 7 PM Fri/Sat

Trash.B9: Around the right side of the house, next to the shed
Trash.B11: Green = recycling, black = trash. When in doubt — trash.
Trash.B12: To the curb by 7 AM Thursday. Bring back Friday.
Trash.B14: Breaker panel is in the laundry room. Sevier Electric: (865) 453-2887. Text host if it's longer than an hour.

Departure.B16:
• Throw any leftover food
• Text the host when on the road — we'll release your deposit faster

Safety & Disclosures.B8: Doorbell camera at front entry (records 30s clips on motion). Driveway floodlight cam covers the gravel lot. No cameras inside the cabin.
Safety & Disclosures.B9: Smoke alarms in each bedroom + the upstairs hallway. Combo smoke/CO alarm in the living room.
Safety & Disclosures.B11: Two ways out of every bedroom: the door and the window. Front door is the primary route; back porch slider is secondary. Meet at the gravel turnaround at the end of the driveway.
Safety & Disclosures.B12: Loft stairs are steep — keep small kids off without a parent. Wood-burning stove is OFF for guest stays; do not use. Hot tub: 104°F max, no diving, kids must be supervised.
